then.prompt: Deploy qilishdan oldin to'liq tekshiruv: 1) @regression-tester - Barcha regression testlarni ishga tushir. 2) @integration-tester - Integration testlarni ishga tushir. 3) @feature-manager - Feature registry va compatibility tekshir. 4) @performance-optimizer - Performance regression tekshir. 5) @security-auditor - Security tekshir. To'liq deploy readiness hisoboti ber.
